groups.label: Internal Data
groups.description: Data your organisation already generates or owns

groups.label: External Data
groups.description: Data sourced from outside platforms, governments, or third parties

groups.label: Technical Infrastructure
groups.description: Systems and tools that need to be in place or integrated

prerequisites.name: Article Content & Metadata
prerequisites.description: Full text of articles, headlines, tags, publication date, author, and category

prerequisites.name: Image & Media Data
prerequisites.description: Photographs and video footage for identity verification and visual evidence

prerequisites.name: User Behaviour Data
prerequisites.description: Click-through records, dwell time, reading patterns, engagement metrics, visit frequency, and session data

prerequisites.name: User Profile / Demographic Data
prerequisites.description: Basic demographic attributes (age, location, device type) for segmentation

prerequisites.name: User Identity & Registration Data
prerequisites.description: Login status and first-party identity graph for cross-session behaviour linkage

prerequisites.name: Ad Inventory & Campaign Performance Data
prerequisites.description: Historical fill rates, CPM/CPC by placement, campaign delivery logs, and unsold inventory records

prerequisites.name: Subscription & Transaction Data
prerequisites.description: Subscription status, plan type, payment history, renewal dates, and historical churn events

prerequisites.name: Content Interaction Data
prerequisites.description: Articles read, comments posted, columnist follows, content shares, and action-level logs

prerequisites.name: Public Records & Structured Data
prerequisites.description: Government registries, corporate filings, court rulings, open-data portals, and statistical datasets

prerequisites.name: External Structured Data
prerequisites.description: Government open data, statistical datasets, geographic and regional data

prerequisites.name: External Unstructured Data
prerequisites.description: Social media posts, third-party news sources, and wire services

prerequisites.name: Search Analytics Data
prerequisites.description: Google Search Console and Google Discover data including keyword rankings and click-through rates

prerequisites.name: Social Media Platform Access & Analytics
prerequisites.description: Posting access and historical engagement metrics from target platforms (e.g. Facebook)

prerequisites.name: CMS Integration Access
prerequisites.description: Access to the content management system for low-latency inference and recommendation delivery

prerequisites.name: Experiment & Prompt Version Management
prerequisites.description: Version-controlled prompt registry to track iterations, parameter configurations, and performance data

prerequisites.name: Push Notification Infrastructure
prerequisites.description: Delivery system with permission management and dynamic frequency control per user

prerequisites.name: Vector Search & Retrieval Infrastructure
prerequisites.description: Hybrid search stack (vector + keyword) with a reranking layer for RAG-based use cases

prerequisites.name: Ad Tech / DMP Infrastructure
prerequisites.description: Data Management Platform capable of applying audience segments in ad serving

prerequisites.name: Creative Asset Pipeline
prerequisites.description: Multi-dimensional creative assets with version tracking and quality-control mechanisms

prerequisites.name: A/B Testing Infrastructure
prerequisites.description: Randomised experiment framework for assigning users to control/treatment groups

prerequisites.name: Paywall & CMS Integration
prerequisites.description: Ability to dynamically control paywall display rules from model output in real time

prerequisites.name: Domain / Editorial Expert Access
prerequisites.description: Subject-matter experts available for fact identification, hypothesis formation, validation, and annotation

prerequisites.name: User Needs Classification Framework
prerequisites.description: A defined taxonomy for categorising reader intent and needs; must be finalised before system build

prerequisites.name: Brand Style Guide
prerequisites.description: Documented brand standards and examples of successful headlines for prompt parameterisation

prerequisites.name: Legal & Compliance Review
prerequisites.description: Pre-assessment of regulatory requirements for personalised pricing in target markets
